description: CompositionPurple printed top made of 100% viscose, has an overlapping V-neckline, short sleeves and has gathers from the horizontal stitch below the bustFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyUse mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)Do not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeDo not iron on printEthnic fused with oodles of attitude results in this stylish top from jealous 21. The off-beat gathering just below the bustline makes it an ideal party wear, and looks great when combined with slim Fit denims and jazzy wedges.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
